desc: Update current Compose stack (pull + up; default action)
Update one or more stacks (pull + up + status)
doc:
dcm update            — current dir
dcm update <dir>      — specific dir
dcm update <parent>   — every immediate subdir with a compose file
dcm -n update         — dry-run
dcm --force update    — pass --force-recreate

desc: Compose down — stop and remove containers

doc:
dcm rollback [<dir>]
dcm -n rollback   — dry-run (show tag commands)
Reads <dir>/.dcm-rollback.json (created by last `dcm update`)

desc: lazydocker — TUI for containers, images, networks, volumes

doc:
docker ps              — running
docker ps -a           — include stopped

docker logs <name>            — full log
docker logs -f <name>         — follow
docker logs --tail 100 <name> — last 100 lines

desc: Run a command in a running container

doc:
docker compose logs -f          — follow all
docker compose logs -f <svc>    — follow one

desc: Disk usage across images / containers / volumes / cache
Prune everything unused (images, containers, networks, cache)
doc:
docker system prune        — interactive
docker system prune -af    — force, all
